    */*: Repair after switching to versioned Go ports

    - Add 1.17 to USES=go for ports that still need go117, remove GO_PORT;
    - Add missing ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} to repair BINARY_ALIAS;
    - Remove explicit dependencies on lang/go.
